productName: DBG Infused Pre-roll Alien OG x Mega Glue - 0.5g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Alien OG x Mega Glue supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of pine, earthy, and lemon, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
